FinancialAuthorityEmail_Description: Email of the manager responsible for the cost center.
FinancialAuthorityName_Description: Full name of the section 34 or 32 manager responsible for the cost center.
If it is your first time signing in, ple: If it is your first time signing in, please follow the
Keywords_Description: Keywords that will identify or locate the workspace based on relevant search queries.
LeadEmail_Description: Email address of the workspace lead.
LeadName_Description: Accountable as Business Owner for all projects and datasets in the workspace. Main business contact responsible for workspace cost ($).
RetentionPeriod_Description: Number of years data will be retained.
RetentionValue_Description: Allowed values: Retention - perpetual/indefinite, Retention - long-term, Archival value, Unknown, None
SecurityClassification_Description: Possible values: Unclassified, Protected A, Protected B.
Subject_Description: The subject(s) of the workspace as defined in the GC Core Subject Thesaurus.
WorkspaceName_Description: The official name of the workspace.
WorkspaceNoMetadata: Workspace has no GC Hosting Metadata
You must create a workspace on the GC Ho: You must create a workspace on the GC Hosting Services Portal or be added to a workspace to join the Federal Science DataHub.
